sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78384" key="paramai/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραμαίνομαι</orth>, <sense id="n78384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be quite mad</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0403.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Amips.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
